summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Espace Personnel 4-tab restructuring (Trajectoire, Compétences, Documents, Matching). All 33 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - 4 tabs render correctly, trust banner visible, 4 visibility cards with toggles, timeline shows 5 steps, step form dialog works, D'CLIC Boost Section displays 4 dimensions for bob23, CV section present, coffre-fort banner with access button, job/learning matching sections functional, AI synthesis generation works.
critical_code_review_comments: 4-tab structure properly implemented with data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Trajectoire tab: Trust banner 'Vous contrôlez votre parcours' displays correctly
Trajectoire tab: 4 visibility cards (Moi, Conseiller, Recruteur, Partenaire) with toggles working
Trajectoire tab: Timeline shows 5 steps with correct types (certification, formation, emploi, recherche, emploi)
Trajectoire tab: Each step displays type badge, dates, visibility, competences correctly
Trajectoire tab: 'Ajouter une étape' button opens dialog with type select (11 types), title, dates, competences, visibility
Trajectoire tab: AI synthesis generation works via Emergent LLM Key (GPT-4o)
Compétences tab: D'CLIC Boost Section shows 4 dimension cards (ENFJ, Influence, Social, Empathie) for bob23
Compétences tab: Toggle expands to show competences fortes and skills importés
Compétences tab: CV section with CvAnalysisSection component present
Compétences tab: Skills display with source legend (D'CLIC PRO, Analyse CV, Centres d'intérêt, Déclaratif)
Documents tab: Coffre-fort banner with 'Accéder au coffre-fort' button
Documents tab: 3 document category cards (Identité professionnelle, Diplômes & Certifications, Preuves de compétences)
Matching tab: Job Matching section with job cards showing match scores
Matching tab: Parcours de Formation section with learning cards
Metrics grid shows correct values: Identité Pro 72%, Job Matching 1-2, Compétences 8, Parcours 5
seed_data_creation: Used existing bob23 user with dclic_imported=True and 5 trajectory steps pre-seeded
context_for_next_testing_agent: Espace Personnel 4-tab restructuring fully tested. Key findings: 1) bob23 has dclic_imported=True with MBTI=ENFJ, DISC=Influence, RIASEC=Social, Vertu=Empathie. 2) 5 trajectory steps exist: certification (D'CLIC PRO), formation (BTS Banque), emploi (Conseiller clientèle), recherche (Transition), emploi (Chargé de projet RH). 3) All 11 step types work (emploi, formation, stage, interim, reconversion, recherche, pause, benevolat, creation, mobilite, certification). 4) All 4 visibility options work (private, accompagnateur, recruteur, public). 5) AI synthesis uses Emergent LLM Key with GPT-4o. 6) Metrics grid shows profile_score, jobs count, skills count, steps count.

backend_apis: GET /api/trajectory/steps returns steps sorted by order ✓
GET /api/profile returns dclic_imported, dclic_mbti, dclic_disc_label, dclic_riasec_major, dclic_vertu_dominante ✓
frontend_components: Step form dialog with type select, title input, save button ✓
